rationale.fidelity: Maps pre-shift inclusion, two fixed capacity constraints, uncertain arrivals and choices, substitution, and expected contribution margin without changing the model.
rationale.managerial_framing: Provides a concrete trigger, actor, capacity-versus-breadth tension, mechanism, bounded question, and relevant counterconditions.
rationale.scholarly_positioning: Scholarly positioning is not requested or claimed; the response appropriately says novelty is unassessed.
rationale.evidence_discipline: Labels substitution as a model assumption and rejects firm-specific profit, delivery-speed, customer-effect, and welfare claims.
rationale.prose_clarity: Clear and precise, but substantially more procedural and verbose than the accessible framing requires.
rationale.overall: Comprehensive and fully faithful with strong boundaries; the only notable weakness is template-heavy length.
